name: Calypso
description:
• From 'Bad Ending Party' Doujinshi

Here he is, in all his... 'infamous' glory. Calypso, the man, the c#ckblock of the Adventurer's Guild, bane of young Adventurers everywhere.

He hasn't meet Rei or Ashe yet, nor has he meet Lihan. So he hasn't done anything to him yet. As Lihan at this point is simply starting out his journey with Rei and Ashe, elsewhere.
creator: Vestara
